name: D+Q diabetic kidney disease pilot reported decreased senescent-cell biomarkers
summary: The preliminary diabetic kidney disease trial reported decreases in senescent-cell and SASP-related biomarkers after intermittent dasatinib plus quercetin.
statement: A small preliminary human trial reported reduced senescent-cell and SASP-related biomarkers after intermittent dasatinib plus quercetin in diabetic kidney disease.
time_horizon: Short-course intermittent treatment with post-treatment tissue and circulating biomarker assessment
caveats: This is preliminary biomarker evidence from a small trial and should not be treated as clinical efficacy.
Registry metadata checked in 2026 indicates the associated ClinicalTrials.gov record has no posted results and remains operationally relevant for follow-up.

provenance.note: Triage-level generated record pending source-located extraction.
